holdings.infoBox: DTAN is an equity ETF with a total of 122 individual holdings. The top holdings are Roche Holding AG stock at 3.58%, Novartis AG at 3.38%, Siemens Aktiengesellschaft at 2.81%, L'Oréal at 2.80%, and Toyota Motor at 2.73%.

overview.description: The Sparkline International Intangible Value ETF (DTAN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed fund of non-US listed companies the fund adviser believes to be attractive in terms of intangible assets. DTAN was launched on Sep 9, 2024 and is issued by Sparkline.
